# Microsoft Excel Online Connector - Full Documentation

# Microsoft Excel Online Connector 1.1

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Microsoft Excel Online (Excel Online Connector) gives you access to the Excel
platform. This connector exposes the most commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Excel
Online API.

For compatibility information and fixed issues, see the Microsoft Excel Online Connector Release
Notes.

## Before You Begin

To use this connector, you must be familiar with:

- The Microsoft Excel Online API
- Anypoint Connectors
- Mule runtime engine (Mule)
- Elements and global elements in a Mule flow
- Creating a Mule app using Anypoint Studio or Anypoint Code Builder

Before creating an app, you must have:

- Credentials to access the Excel target resource
- Anypoint Studio or Anypoint Code Builder

## Common Use Cases for the Connector

Some possible uses for this connector include:

- Sales
  - Organize your companyâs sales in a spreadsheet to perform cost studies, inventory management, or
    production scheduling.
  - Create a chart of your companyâs inventory and analyze that data to encourage your customers to
    buy certain items.

- Data
  - Visualize and share data regarding your customers, subscriptions, orders, charges, refunds, and
    events.

## Authentication Type

Microsoft Excel Online Connector uses the OAuth 2.0 authentication type, which delegates user
authentication to the service hosting the user account.

## Next Step

After you complete the prerequisites, you are ready to create your own app and configure the
connector using [Anypoint Studio](microsoft-excel-online-connector-studio).

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Use Exchange to Discover Connectors, Templates, and Examples](../../connectors/introduction/intro-use-exchange)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Microsoft Excel Online Connector 1.1 Examples

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

This example shows you how to use Microsoft Excel Online Connector to perform the following actions:

- [Add a worksheet](#add-a-worksheet)
- [List a worksheet](#list-a-worksheet)
- [Update a worksheet](#update-a-worksheet)
- [Delete a worksheet](#delete-a-worksheet)

## Configure OAuth Authorization

Because this connector uses OAuth to secure connections, you must specify OAuth field values, such
as client credentials, keys, and OAuth-related URLs. To do this:

- Create a configuration file for the OAuth connection.
- Configure the OAuth-related global elements.
- Configure a global element for the properties file.

### Create a Configuration File for the OAuth Connection

Create a configuration file for the OAuth connection that includes properties for the
`Authorization Code` grant type:

1.  Create a file named `mule-app.properties` in the `/src/main/resources/` folder.
2.  In the `mule-app.properties` file, create a set of properties for the `Authorization Code` grant
    type, similar to the ones that follow, replacing the bracketed text (including the brackets)
    with the correct values for your OAuth configuration:

    config.oauth.authorization.code.consumerKey=<consumerKey>
    config.oauth.authorization.code.consumerSecret=<consumerSecret>
    config.oauth.authorization.code.authorizationUrl=<authorizationUrl>
    config.oauth.authorization.code.accessTokenUrl=<accessTokenUrl>

For more information about creating a properties file, see
[Configuring Property Placeholders](../../mule-runtime/latest/mule-app-properties-to-configure).

### Configure the OAuth Global Elements

Configure global elements for the `OAuth_Authorization_Code_Config` file:

1.  Create a new Mule project.
2.  In the **Mule Palette** view, click **Search in Exchange** and enter `microsoft excel`.
3.  Add **Microsoft Excel Online Connector** to the **Selected modules** section and click
    **Finish**.
4.  Click the **Global Elements** tab and click **Create**.
5.  Select **Connector Configuration > Microsoft Excel Online Authorization Code Config** and click
    **OK**.
6.  Enter the following values:

    <table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Value</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p><code>OAuth_Authorization_Code_Config</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer key</p></td><td><p><code>${config.oauth.authorization.code.consumerKey}</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer secret</p></td><td><p><code>${config.oauth.authorization.code.consumerSecret}</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorization url</p></td><td><p><code>${config.oauth.authorization.code.authorizationUrl}</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Access token url</p></td><td><p><code>${config.oauth.authorization.code.accessTokenUrl}</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scopes</p></td><td><p>Leave the default: <code>https://graph.microsoft.com/.default</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Listener config</p></td><td><p><code>auth</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Callback path</p></td><td><p><code>/callback</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorize path</p></td><td><p><code>authorizePath</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>External callback url</p></td><td><p><code>http://localhost:8083/callback</code></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

7.  Click **OK**.

### Configure a Global Element for the Properties File

Configure a global element for the `mule-app.properties` file so that Mule knows where to find it:

1.  Click the **Global Elements** tab and click **Create**.
2.  In the **Choose Global Type** dialog, select **Configuration properties** and click **OK**.
3.  In the **File** field, enter `mule.app.properties`.
4.  Click **OK**.

## Add a Worksheet

The following screenshot shows the Studio app flow for adding a new worksheet:

![Add Worksheet Studio flow](_images/microsoft-excel-online-add-worksheet.png)

Figure 1. Use a flow like this one to add a new worksheet.

Adding a new worksheet involves configuring an HTTP **Listener** component, **Transform Message**
component, **Add worksheet** operation, and **Logger** component.

To create the flow:

1.  Create a new Mule project in Studio.
2.  In the **Mule Palette** view, search for **HTTP** and select the **Listener** operation.
3.  Drag the **Listener** operation onto the canvas.
4.  In the **Listener** configuration, click **+** next to the **Connector configuration** field to
    add a global element.
5.  Accept the defaults.
6.  In the HTTP properties window, set the **Path** field to `/create`.

### Add the Transform Message Component

The first **Transform Message** component creates a template for the input used to create the team:

1.  In the **Mule Palette** view, search for **transform message**.
2.  Drag the **Transform Message** component onto the canvas, to the right of the **Listener**
    component.
3.  In the **Transform Message** configuration, overlay the brackets in the **Output** section with
    this XML:

    ```xml
    <ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
    output application/json
    ---
    {
    	workbookId: attributes.queryParams.workbookID,
    	worsheetname: attributes.queryParams.worksheetName
    }]]></ee:set-payload>
    ```

### Add the Add Worksheet Operation

The **Add Worksheet** operation creates a new worksheet based on user input:

1.  Drag the **Add worksheet** operation onto the canvas, to the right of the **Transform Message**
    component.
2.  In the Add worksheet configuration, click the **Connector configuration** dropdown and select
    **Microsoft-Excel-Online-Authorization-Code-Config**.
3.  Select **Microsoft_Excel_Online_Authorization_Code_Config** as the global element type and click
    **OK**.
4.  Configure the following fields in the Add worksheet properties window:

    <table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Value</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><p><code>payload.workbookId</code></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><p><code>payload.worsheetname</code></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

## List a Worksheet

Create a second flow to list a worksheet. Use the **List worksheet** operation in this flow:

![List Worksheet Studio flow](_images/microsoft-excel-online-list-worksheet.png)

Figure 2. Use a flow like this one to list a worksheet.

## Update a Worksheet

Create a third flow to update information about a worksheet. Use the **Update worksheet** operation
in this flow:

![Update Worksheet Studio flow](_images/microsoft-excel-online-update-worksheet.png)

Figure 3. Use a flow like this one to update information about a worksheet.

## Delete a Worksheet

Create a fourth flow to delete a worksheet. Use the **Delete worksheet** operation in this flow:

![Delete Worksheet Studio flow](_images/microsoft-excel-online-delete-worksheet.png)

Figure 4. Use a flow like this one to delete a worksheet.

## Run the App

To run the app:

1.  Right-click the project in Package Explorer and select **Run As > Mule Application**.
2.  After the app deploys, open a web browser.
3.  Enter the following URL to start the OAuth dance: `http://localhost:8081/authorize`.
4.  In the login screen, enter the login information used to access Microsoft Excel Online and click
    **Login**.
5.  Click **Allow**.
6.  Initiate a flow by entering the associated URL, as shown in the following table:

    <table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Flow</th><th>URL</th><th>Notes</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Add a worksheet</p></td><td><p><code><a href="http://localhost:8081/create?workbookID={workbookID}&amp;worksheetName={worksheetName}">http://localhost:8081/create?workbookID={workbookID}&amp;worksheetName={worksheetName}</a></code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>List a worksheet</p></td><td><p><code><a href="http://localhost:8081/list?workbookID={workbookID}">http://localhost:8081/list?workbookID={workbookID}</a></code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Update a worksheet</p></td><td><p><code><a href="http://localhost:8081/update?workbookID={workbookID}&amp;worksheetName={worksheetName}&amp;worksheetUpdateName={worksheetUpdateName}">http://localhost:8081/update?workbookID={workbookID}&amp;worksheetName={worksheetName}&amp;worksheetUpdateName={worksheetUpdateName}</a></code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delete a worksheet</p></td><td><p><code><a href="http://localhost:8081/delete?workbookID={workbookID}&amp;worksheetName={worksheetName}">http://localhost:8081/delete?workbookID={workbookID}&amp;worksheetName={worksheetName}</a></code></p></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## XML for the Examples

Paste this XML code into the **Configuration XML** tab in your project to experiment with the flows
described in the previous sections. When you paste this code, click **Yes** on the **Regenerate
'doc:id' Values** dialog.

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:excel="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/excel"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/excel http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/excel/current/mule-excel.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">
	<http:listener-config name="HTTP_Listener_config" doc:name="HTTP Listener config" doc:id="b67a7f0e-9d8f-43ee-b3d8-0a2f86fe10c5" >
		<http:listener-connection host="0.0.0.0" port="8081" />
	</http:listener-config>
	<excel:authorization-code-config name="Microsoft_Excel_Online_Authorization_Code_Config" doc:name="Microsoft Excel Online Authorization Code Config" doc:id="a03ea31c-ab5c-4508-ae87-91485d0d9201" >
		<excel:oauth-authorization-code-connection >
			<excel:oauth-authorization-code consumerKey="${consumerKey}" consumerSecret="${consumerSecret}" authorizationUrl="${authorizationUrl}" accessTokenUrl="${accessTokenUrl}" scopes="${scopes}" resourceOwnerId="${resourceOwnerId}"/>
			<excel:oauth-callback-config listenerConfig="HTTP_Listener_config" callbackPath="/callback" authorizePath="/authorize" externalCallbackUrl="http://localhost:8081/callback" />
		</excel:oauth-authorization-code-connection>
	</excel:authorization-code-config>
	<configuration-properties doc:name="Configuration properties" doc:id="2820ecc1-e8be-4b5f-8d6e-5eb3afaf1732" file="mule-app.properties" />
	<flow name="create-flow" doc:id="fcdaa88d-173a-4213-aaef-65bdcf384f03" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="f6a51e00-2be8-4524-9e39-cd4e3387b5e0" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/create"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="f277839a-9e59-4d2a-9d53-c4d2f012ae90" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	workbookId: attributes.queryParams.workbookID,
	worsheetname: attributes.queryParams.worksheetName
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<excel:add-worksheet doc:name="Add worksheet" doc:id="071f5319-16ae-43dc-9420-bf47479eb3d1" config-ref="Microsoft_Excel_Online_Authorization_Code_Config" workbookId="#[payload.workbookId]" worksheetName="#[payload.worsheetname]"/>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="9dd54e43-357e-454d-94ff-ccace4bcb580" message="Worksheet ID : #[payload.id]"/>
	</flow>
	<flow name="list-flow" doc:id="5b1b8836-f3a2-445e-b495-c80d93dcd82d" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="0ffa794c-37a4-4c57-a14d-da7009fa504f" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/list" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="f71f89a7-0f51-44ba-9e46-18e6f8dcc8c8" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	workbookId: attributes.queryParams.workbookID
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<excel:list-worksheet doc:name="List worksheet" doc:id="5e576012-f3a1-428a-b20f-d9d5a3442398" config-ref="Microsoft_Excel_Online_Authorization_Code_Config" workbookId="#[payload.workbookId]"/>
	</flow>
	<flow name="update-flow" doc:id="0cfe6bad-85e8-4e61-9688-52c6b37a93a8" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="6c874287-c011-4b19-b3e8-55744003f0f6" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/update"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="d0697ad3-e842-48cd-b0c4-016dd65a712e" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
		name : attributes.queryParams.worksheetUpdateName
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<excel:update-worksheet doc:name="Update worksheet" doc:id="983a65bc-584b-4199-867d-abfb9cf09bcb" config-ref="Microsoft_Excel_Online_Authorization_Code_Config" workbookId="#[attributes.queryParams.workbookID]" worksheetId="#[attributes.queryParams.worksheetName]">
		</excel:update-worksheet>
	</flow>
	<flow name="delete-flow" doc:id="c989f49f-809c-4593-95dc-f93f8634c609" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="f6e8d004-e264-48c1-85cf-b2ce5a0135d6" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/delete"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="ea4da82b-cd40-4bf6-b8c7-04efe280d835" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	workbookId: attributes.queryParams.workbookID,
	worksheetName: attributes.queryParams.worksheetName
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<excel:delete-worksheet doc:name="Delete worksheet" doc:id="183fb53f-0c3d-42c2-8676-df485f9a5f43" config-ref="Microsoft_Excel_Online_Authorization_Code_Config" workbookId="#[payload.workbookId]" worksheetId="#[payload.worksheetName]"/>
	</flow>
</mule>
```
---

# Microsoft Excel Online Connector 1.1 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Microsoft Excel Online (Excel Online Connector) gives you access to the most
commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Excel Online API.

Microsoft Excel Online Connector API has some limitations. See the following link for more details:
[https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/connectors/excelonline/](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/connectors/excelonline/)

## Configurations

---

### Authorization Code Config

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#AuthorizationCodeConfig_OauthAuthorizationCode">OAuth v2.0 Authorization Code</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Encoding</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canonical name of the encoding. See Oracleâs supported encodings at <a href="https://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/technotes/guides/intl/encoding.doc.html">https://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/technotes/guides/intl/encoding.doc.html</a>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The identifier of this element used to reference it in other components</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### OAuth v2.0 Authorization Code

Use OAuth 2.0 to delegate user authentication to the service hosting the user account. For more
information, refer to
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2) or
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors on CloudHub](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2-cloudhub).

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Proxy configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ProxyConfiguration">Proxy Configuration</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Proxy configuration for the connector.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the method to use to send the resulting token back to your app. It must be <code>query</code>.</p></td><td><p>query</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines a configuration for TLS, which can be used from both the client and server sides to secure communication for the Mule app. If HTTPS is configured as the protocol, then, at a minimum, the user must configure the keystore configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to <code>true</code>, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Key</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth consumerKey as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Secret</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth consumerSecret as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorization Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs authorization endpoint URL.</p></td><td><p>https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant}/oauth2/v2.0/authorize</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Access Token Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs accessToken endpoint URL.</p></td><td><p>https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant}/oauth2/v2.0/token</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scopes</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth scopes to request during the OAuth dance. If not provided, this value defaults to those in the annotation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Resource Owner Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The resourceOwnerId that each component should use if it is not otherwise referenced.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Before</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a flow to execute immediately before starting the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>After</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a flow to execute immediately after an accessToken is received.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Listener Config</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A reference to an &lt;http:listener-config /&gt; to use to create the listener that receives the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Callback Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorize Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the local HTTP endpoint that triggers the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>External Callback Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>If the callback endpoint is behind a proxy or must be accessed through a non direct URL, use this parameter to tell the OAuth provider the URL to use to access the callback.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Object Store</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A reference to the object store to use to store each resource owner IDâs data. If not specified, Mule automatically provisions the default one.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Operations

## Add Chart

`<excel:add-chart>`

Creates a new chart.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The body of the chart to add.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Add Named Item

`<excel:add-named-item>`

Adds a new name to the collection of a given scope using the userâs locale for the formula.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where rows are added.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the named item.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reference</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The formula or the range that the name will refer to.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The comment associated with the named item.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Add Named Item Formula Local

`<excel:add-named-item-formula-local>`

Adds a new name to the collection of a given scope using the userâs locale for the formula.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Id of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the named item.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reference</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The formula or the range that the name will refer to.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The comment associated with the named item.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY

- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Add Rows

`<excel:add-rows>`

Adds rows to the end of the table. The API can accept data from multiple rows, so adding one row at
a time may lead to performance degradation. Batch the rows together in a single API call rather than
doing single row insertion. Experiment with the number of rows to determine the ideal number of rows
to use in a single API call.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where rows are added.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the table is located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Rows</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The rows to be added.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Add Table

`<excel:add-table>`

Creates a new table. The range source address determines which worksheet the table will be added to.
If the table cannot be added, for example, if the address is invalid or the table overlaps with
another table, an error is thrown.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where rows are added.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the table is located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Address or name of the range object representing the data source. If the address does not contain a sheet name, the currently-active sheet is used.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Has Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Boolean value that indicates whether the data being imported has column labels. If the source does not contain headers, for example, when this property is set to <code>false</code>, Excel will automatically generate the header by shifting the data down by one row.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Add Worksheet

`<excel:add-worksheet>`

Adds a new worksheet to the workbook. The worksheet is added to the end of the existing worksheets.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbook ID where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The worksheet name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Calculate Workbook Application

`<excel:calculate-workbook-application>`

Recalculate all currently opened workbooks in Microsoft Excel.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Calculation Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>FULL</p></li><li><p>RECALCULATE</p></li><li><p>FULLREBUILD</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>The calculation type to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Chart Set Position

`<excel:chart-set-position>`

Positions the chart relative to the cells on the worksheet.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or the name of the chart.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Position Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The position body.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Create Chart Series

`<excel:create-chart-series>`

Creates a new ChartSeries.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the chart.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Series Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The series body of the chart.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Create Table Column

`<excel:create-table-column>`

Creates a new column for the table.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where columns are located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the columns are located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. ## Delete Chart

`<excel:delete-chart>`

Deletes the chart object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or the name of chart.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Delete Row

`<excel:delete-row>`

Deletes a row from the table.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. from where the row will be deleted.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the rows are located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Row Index</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The index of the row to be deleted.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Delete Table

`<excel:delete-table>`

Deletes a row from the table.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where table is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the table is located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Delete Worksheet

`<excel:delete-worksheet>`

Deletes a worksheet from the workbook.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbook ID where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The worksheet name to delete.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams.
