## Get Cell

`<excel:get-cell>`

Gets the range object containing a single cell based on row and column numbers. The cell can be
outside the bounds of its parent range as long as it stays within the worksheet grid.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbook ID where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The worksheet name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Row</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The row value of the cell.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The column value of the cell.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Chart

`<excel:get-chart>`

Reads the properties and relationships of a chart object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Corresponding chart ID or name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Chart Image

`<excel:get-chart-image>`

Renders the chart as a base64-encoded image by scaling the chart to fit the specified dimensions.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or the name of chart.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Width</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The width of the image.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Height</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The height of the image.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Fitting Mode</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The fitting mode of the image.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Chart Item At

`<excel:get-chart-item-at>`

Gets a chart based on its position in the collection.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbookId where chart is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>(DEPRECATED) Chart Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Corresponding chart name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>(DEPRECATED) Request Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Body of the request. Use the <strong>Index</strong> field instead.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Index</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Index value of the chart to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION

- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Get Columns After Range

`<excel:get-columns-after-range>`

Gets a certain number of columns to the right of the given range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of columns to include in the resulting range.</p></td><td><p>1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Columns Before Range

`<excel:get-columns-before-range>`

Gets a certain number of columns to the left of the given range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of columns to include in the resulting range.</p></td><td><p>1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. ## Get Named Item

`<excel:get-named-item>`

Retrieves the properties and relationships of a NamedItem object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where rows are added.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the named item.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Offset Range

`<excel:get-offset-range>`

Gets an object that represents a range that is offset from the specified range. The dimension of the
returned range matches this range. If the resulting range is forced outside the bounds of the
worksheet grid, an exception is thrown.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Row Offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of rows by which the range is offset. Positive values are offset downward and negative values are offset upward.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of columns by which the range is offset. Positive values are offset to the right and negative values are offset to the left.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Range

`<excel:get-range>`

Retrieves the properties and relationships of a range object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Range Cell

`<excel:get-range-cell>`

Gets the range object containing a single cell based on row and column numbers. The cell can be
outside the bounds of its parent range, as long as it stays within the worksheet grid. The returned
cell is located relative to the top left cell of the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Row number</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Row number of the cell to be retrieved. Zero-indexed.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Number</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Column number of the cell to be retrieved. Zero-indexed.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Range Column

`<excel:get-range-column>`

Gets a column contained in the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Number</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Column number of the cell to be retrieved. Zero-indexed.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

## Get Range Entire Column

`<excel:get-range-entire-column>`

Gets an object that represents the entire column of the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Range Entire Row

`<excel:get-range-entire-row>`

Gets an object that represents the entire row of the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Range Format

`<excel:get-range-format>`

Retrieves the properties and relationships of the RangeFormat object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Range Intersection

`<excel:get-range-intersection>`

Gets the range object that represents the rectangular intersection of the given ranges.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Another Range</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The range object or address or range name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Range Last Cell

`<excel:get-range-last-cell>`

Gets the last cell within the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Range Last Row

`<excel:get-range-last-row>`

Gets the last row within the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Range Row

`<excel:get-range-row>`

Gets a row contained in the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Row Number</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Row number of the range to be retrieved. Zero-indexed.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. ## Get Resized Range

`<excel:get-resized-range>`

Gets a range object similar to the current range object, but with the bottom-right corner expanded
or contracted by a specified number of rows and columns.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delta Rows</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of rows by which to expand the bottom-right corner, relative to the current range. Use a positive number to expand the range, or a negative number to decrease it.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delta Columns</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of columns by which to expand the bottom-right corner, relative to the current range. Use a positive number to expand the range, or a negative number to decrease it.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
