- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Row

`<excel:get-row>`

Retrieves a list of TableRow objects.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where rows are located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the rows are located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Row Index</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The index of the row to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

## Get Rows Above Range

`<excel:get-rows-above-range>`

Gets a certain number of rows above a given range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of rows to include in the resulting range.</p></td><td><p>1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Rows Below Range

`<excel:get-rows-below-range>`

Gets a certain number of rows below a given range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of rows to include in the resulting range.</p></td><td><p>1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Table

`<excel:get-table>`

Retrieves the properties and relationships of a table object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where table is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the table is located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN

- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS

- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Table Range

`<excel:get-table-range>`

Gets the range object associated with the entire table.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Used Range

`<excel:get-used-range>`

Gets the used range, which is the smallest range that encompasses any cells that have a value or
formatting assigned to them.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbook ID where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The worksheet name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Values Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Considers only cells with values as used cells (ignores formatting).</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Workbook Application

`<excel:get-workbook-application>`

Retrieves the properties and relationships of a workbookApplication object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. the application will retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Workbook Comment

`<excel:get-workbook-comment>`

Retrieves the properties and relationships of a workbookComment object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the comment is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Comment Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the comment to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Get Worksheet

`<excel:get-worksheet>`

Retrieves the properties and relationships of a worksheet object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbook ID where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The worksheet name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Insert Range

`<excel:insert-range>`

Inserts a cell or a range of cells into the worksheet. It shifts the other cells to make space and
returns a new Range object at the now blank space.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Shift</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>DOWN</p></li><li><p>RIGHT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies which way to shift the cells. The possible values are: Down, Right.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## List Chart Series

`<excel:list-chart-series>`

Lists a ChartSeries.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The size of the pages retrieved by the query.</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

Retrieves a list of chart objects.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. ## List Columns

`<excel:list-columns>`

Retrieves a list of TableColumn objects.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The size of the pages retrieved by the query.</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## List Named Item

`<excel:list-named-item>`

Retrieves a list of NamedItem objects.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where rows are added.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The size of the pages retrieved by the query.</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS

- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## List Names

Retrieves a list of NamedItem objects.

### Parameters

## List Pivot Tables

`<excel:list-pivot-tables>`

Gets a workbookPivotTable object collection.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbook ID where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The worksheet name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The size of the pages retrieved by the query.</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR

- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## List Tables

`<excel:list-tables>`

Retrieves a list of table objects.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The size of the pages retrieved by the query.</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

## Range Bounding Rect

`<excel:range-bounding-rect>`

Gets the smallest range object that encompasses the given ranges.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Another Range</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The range object or address or range name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Range Clear

`<excel:range-clear>`

Clears values such as range values, format, fill, or border.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Apply To</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ALL</p></li><li><p>FORMATS</p></li><li><p>CONTENTS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Determines the type of clear action. The possible values are: All, Formats, Contents.</p></td><td><p>ALL</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY

## Range Delete

`<excel:range-delete>`

Deletes the cells associated with the range.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Shift</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>UP</p></li><li><p>LEFT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies which way to shift the cells. The possible values are: Up, Left.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Range Get Used Range

`<excel:range-get-used-range>`

Returns the used range of the given range object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the range.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address of the range.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Values Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Considers only cells with values as used cells.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>x</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>
