## Range Merge

`<excel:range-merge>`

Merges the range cells into one region in the worksheet.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Across</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Set <code>true</code> to merge cells in each row of the specified range as separate merged cells.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Range Unmerge

`<excel:range-unmerge>`

Unmerges the range cells into separate cells.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Reset Chart Data

`<excel:reset-chart-data>`

Resets the source data for the chart.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Corresponding chart ID or name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Source Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Corresponding chart source body.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Select</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Properties to retrieve in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expand</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The response will include information regarding the specified relationship.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieves a subset of a collection.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specifies the sort order of the items returned.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restricts the results of a request to match a search criteria.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Unauthorize

`<excel:unauthorize>`

Deletes all the access token information of a given resource owner ID so that it is impossible to
execute any operation for that user without doing the authorization dance again.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Resource Owner Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the resource owner of which access must be invalidated.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

## Update Chart

`<excel:update-chart>`

Update the properties of a chart object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook. where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the component is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Corresponding chart ID or name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Chart Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>In the request body, supply the values for relevant fields that should be updated.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:BAD_REQUEST
- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:FORBIDDEN
- EXCEL:INVALID_CONNECTION
- EXCEL:INVALID_CREDENTIALS
- EXCEL:NOT_FOUND
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- EXCEL:SERVER_ERROR
- EXCEL:TIMEOUT

## Update Named Item

`<excel:update-named-item>`

Update the properties of the NamedItem object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where rows are added.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the named item.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Supplies the values for relevant fields that should be updated.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Column Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID or name of the column.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Range Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Supply the values for relevant fields that should be updated.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. ## Update Row

`<excel:update-row>`

Update the row.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook where rows are added.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet where the table is located.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Row Index</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The index of the row to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Columns</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>The columns to add.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Update Table

`<excel:update-table>`

Update the properties of a table object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Name/Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the table. to be updated.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Table Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The new content of the table.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Update Worksheet

`<excel:update-worksheet>`

Update the properties of a worksheet object.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The workbook ID where the worksheet is located.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The worksheet name to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

### Throws

- EXCEL:CONNECTIVITY
- EXCEL:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Sources

## On New Row Listener

`<excel:new-row-listener>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Primary Node Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether this source should only be executed on the primary node when running in a cluster.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><p>scheduling-strategy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the scheduler that triggers the polling.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Redelivery Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RedeliveryPolicy">Redelivery Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines a policy for processing the redelivery of the same message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## On New Worksheet Listener

`<excel:new-worksheet-listener>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Primary Node Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether this source should only be executed on the primary node when running in a cluster.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><p>scheduling-strategy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the scheduler that triggers the polling.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## On Updated Row Listener

`<excel:updated-row-listener>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Workbook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the workbook.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Include New Rows</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Columns To Monitor</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>List of columns which will be monitored for updated data. For example, some possible values are A, B, C, AA, or BB.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Primary Node Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether this source should only be executed on the primary node when running in a cluster.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><p>scheduling-strategy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the scheduler that triggers the polling.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Redelivery Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RedeliveryPolicy">Redelivery Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines a policy for processing the redelivery of the same message.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Response timeout unit for the request. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom query parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters that the request will include. The ones specified here will overwrite the default ones specified in the config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Authorization Code Config](#AuthorizationCodeConfig)

## Types

### Proxy Configuration

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Host</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Host where the proxy requests are sent.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Port where the proxy requests are sent.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Username</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The username to authenticate against the proxy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password to authenticate against the proxy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### TLS

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Protocols</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of protocols enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Cipher Suites</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of cipher suites enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Trust Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#TrustStore">Trust Store</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#KeyStore">Keystore</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Revocation Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#StandardRevocationCheck">Standard Revocation Check</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CustomOcspResponder">Custom OCSP Responder</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CrlFile">CRL File</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Trust Store

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the truststore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the truststore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of truststore used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the truststore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Insecure</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, Mule stops performing certificate validations. This can make connections vulnerable to attacks.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Keystore

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the keystore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of keystore used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the keystore contains many private keys, this attribute indicates the alias of the key to use. If not defined, the first key in the file is used by default.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password used to protect the private key.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password used to protect the keystore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Algorithm used by the keystore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Standard Revocation Check

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Only End Entities</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Only verify the last element of the certificate chain.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Prefer Crls</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Try CRL instead of OCSP first.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>No Fallback</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Do not use the secondary checking method (the one not selected before).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Soft Fail</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Avoid verification failure when the revocation server can not be reached or is busy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Custom OCSP Responder

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Url</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The URL of the OCSP responder.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Cert Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Alias of the signing certificate for the OCSP response (must be in the truststore), if present.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### CRL File

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The path to the CRL file.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnection

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Fails Deployment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to <code>true</code>, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The reconnection strategy to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>false</code>, the reconnection strategy will run in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How many reconnection attempts to make.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect Forever

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>false</code>, the reconnection strategy will run in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Expiration Policy

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max Idle Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A scalar time value for the maximum amount of time a dynamic configuration instance should be allowed to be idle before itâs considered eligible for expiration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit that qualifies the <strong>Max Idle Time</strong> attribute.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable In Memory Stream

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Initial Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Initial amount of memory to allocate to the memory stream. If the stream data exceeds this value, the buffer expands by <strong>Buffer Size Increment</strong>, with an upper limit <strong>Max In Memory Size value</strong>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Size Increment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Amount by which the buffer size expands if it exceeds its initial size. Setting a value of <code>0</code> or lower specifies that the buffer canât expand. Mule raises a <code>STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED</code> error when the buffer gets full.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Maximum size of the buffer. A value less than or equal to <code>0</code> means no limit.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>BYTE</p></li><li><p>KB</p></li><li><p>MB</p></li><li><p>GB</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The unit in which all these attributes are expressed</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable File Store Stream

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>In Memory Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Defines the maximum memory that the stream should use to keep data in memory. If more than that is consumed content on the disk is buffered.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>BYTE</p></li><li><p>KB</p></li><li><p>MB</p></li><li><p>GB</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The unit in which maxInMemorySize is expressed</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Redelivery Policy

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max Redelivery Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of times a message can be redelivered and processed unsuccessfully before triggering process-failed-message</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Message Digest Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The secure hashing algorithm to use. If not set, the default is SHA-256.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Message Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RedeliveryPolicyMessageIdentifier">Redelivery Policy Message Identifier</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Defines which strategy is used to identify the messages.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Object Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ObjectStore</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The object store where the redelivery counter for each message is stored.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Redelivery Policy Message Identifier

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Use Secure Hash</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether to use a secure hash algorithm to identify a redelivered message.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Id Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Defines one or more expressions to use to determine when a message has been redelivered. This property may only be set if useSecureHash is false.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable In Memory Iterable

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Initial Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The number of instances to initially keep in memory to consume the stream and provide random access to it. If the stream contains more data than can fit into this buffer, then the buffer expands according to the bufferSizeIncrement attribute, with an upper limit of maxInMemorySize. Default value is 100 instances.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Size Increment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is by how much the buffer size expands if it exceeds its initial size. Setting a value of zero or lower means that the buffer should not expand, meaning that a STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED error is raised when the buffer gets full. Default value is 100 instances.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum amount of memory to use. If more than that is used then a STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED error is raised. A value lower than or equal to zero means no limit.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable File Store Iterable

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>In Memory Objects</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum amount of instances to keep in memory. If more than that is required, content on the disk is buffered.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>BYTE</p></li><li><p>KB</p></li><li><p>MB</p></li><li><p>GB</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The unit in which maxInMemorySize is expressed</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## See Also

- [Microsoft Excel Online Connector Overview](./)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Microsoft Excel Online Connector 1.1

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Studio (Studio) editors help you design and update your Mule applications, properties, and
configuration files.

To add and configure a connector in Studio:

1.  [Create a Mule project](#create-mule-project).
2.  [Add the connector to your Mule project](#add-connector-to-project).
3.  [Configure a source for the connectorâs flow](#configure-input-source).
4.  [Add a connector operation to the flow](#add-connector-operation).
5.  [Configure a global element for the connector](#configure-global-element).
6.  [Configure the other connector fields](#configure-other-fields).

When you run the connector, you can view the app log to check for problems in real time, as
described in [View the App Log](#view-app-log).

If you are new to configuring connectors in Studio, see
[Using Anypoint Studio to Configure a Connector](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-studio).
If, after reading this topic, you need additional information about the connector fields, see the
[Microsoft Excel Online Connector Reference](microsoft-excel-online-connector-reference).

## Create a Mule Project

In Studio, create a new Mule project in which to add and configure the connector:

1.  In Studio, select **File > New > Mule Project**.
2.  Enter a name for your Mule project and click **Finish**.

## Add the Connector to Your Mule Project

Add Anypoint Connector for Microsoft Excel Online (Excel Online Connector) to your Mule project to
automatically populate the XML code with the connectorâs namespace and schema location and add the
required dependencies to the projectâs `pom.xml` file:

1.  In the **Mule Palette** view, click **(X) Search in Exchange**.
2.  In the **Add Dependencies to Project** window, type `excel` in the search field.
3.  Click **Excel Connector** in **Available modules**.
4.  Click **Add**.
5.  Click **Finish**.

Adding a connector to a Mule project in Studio does not make that connector available to other
projects in your Studio workspace.

## Configure a Source

A source initiates a flow when a specified condition is met. You can configure one of these sources
to use with Excel Online Connector:

- HTTP Listener  
  Initiates a flow each time it receives a request on the configured host and port
- Scheduler  
  Initiates a flow when a time-based condition is met

For example, to configure an HTTP Listener source, follow these steps:

1.  In the **Mule Palette** view, select **HTTP > Listener**.
2.  Drag **Listener** to the Studio canvas.
3.  On the **Listener** configuration screen, optionally change the value of the **Display Name**
    field.
4.  Specify a value for the **Path** field.
5.  Click the plus sign (**+**) next to the **Connector configuration** field to configure a global
    element that can be used by all instances of the HTTP Listener source in the app.
6.  On the **General** tab, specify the connection information for the connector.
7.  On the **TLS** tab, optionally specify the TLS information for the connector.
8.  On the **Advanced** tab, optionally specify reconnection information, including a reconnection
    strategy.
9.  Click **Test Connection** to confirm that Mule can connect with the specified server.
10. Click **OK**.

## Add a Connector Operation to the Flow

When you add a connector operation to your flow, you are specifying an action for that connector to
perform.

To add an operation for Excel Online Connector, follow these steps:

1.  In the **Mule Palette** view, select **Excel** and then select the desired operation.
2.  Drag the operation onto the Studio canvas to the right of the source.

## Configure a Global Element for the Connector

When you configure a connector, configure a global element that all instances of that connector in
the app can use. Configuring a global element requires you to provide the authentication credentials
that the connector requires to access the target Excel Online system. Excel Online Connector
supports OAuth 2.0 authentication.

To configure the global element for Excel Online Connector, follow these steps:

1.  Select the operation in the Studio canvas.
2.  In the configuration screen for the operation, click the plus sign (**+**) next to the
    **Connector configuration** field to access the global element configuration fields.
3.  On the **General** tab, in **Connection**, select the
    [OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code](#oauth2-authorization) authentication method to configure.

    You can reference a configuration file that contains ANT-style property placeholders
    (recommended), or you can enter your authorization credentials in the global configuration
    properties. For information about the benefits of using property placeholders and how to
    configure them, see
    [Anypoint Connector Configuration](../../connectors/introduction/intro-connector-configuration-overview).

4.  On the **Advanced** tab, optionally specify reconnection information, including a reconnection
    strategy.
5.  Click **Test Connection** to confirm that Mule can connect with the specified server.
6.  Click **OK**.

### OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Authentication

Use OAuth 2.0 to delegate user authentication to the service hosting the user account. For more
information, refer to
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2) or
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors on CloudHub](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2-cloudhub).

Enter the following information on the **General** tab of the **Global Element Properties** screen
to configure OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code authentication:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>User Action</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enter the configuration name.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Connection</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Select <strong>OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code</strong>.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Consumer Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>OAuth consumer key as registered with the Microsoft identity platform.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Consumer Secret</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>OAuth consumer secret that corresponds to the consumer key.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Listener Config</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>A reference to an <code>&lt;http:listener-config /&gt;</code> to use to create the listener that receives the access token callback endpoint.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Callback Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Path of the access token callback endpoint.</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Authorize Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Path of the local HTTP endpoint that triggers the OAuth dance.</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Configure Additional Connector Fields

After you configure a global element for Excel Online Connector, configure the other required fields
for the connector. The required fields vary depending on which connector operation you use.

## View the App Log

To check for problems, you can view the app log as follows:

- If youâre running the app from Anypoint Platform, the app log output is visible in the Anypoint
  Studio console window.
- If youâre running the app using Mule from the command line, the app log output is visible in your
  OS console.

Unless the log file path is customized in the appâs log file (`log4j2.xml`), you can also view the
app log in the default location `MULE_HOME/logs/<app-name>.log`.

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure a Connector](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-studio)
- [Microsoft Excel Online Connector Reference](microsoft-excel-online-connector-reference)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Microsoft Excel Online Connector 1.1 XML and Maven Support

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Although you can manually code a Mule app in XML, it is more efficient to use Anypoint Studio:

- If you manually code a Mule runtime engine (Mule) app in XML, either from the Anypoint Studio XML
  editor or from a text editor, you can access the connector from your app by adding reference
  statements to both your XML Mule flow and the Apache Maven `pom.xml` file.
- If you add the connector in Studio, Studio automatically populates the XML code with the
  connectorâs namespace and schema location and it also adds a dependency to the `pom.xml` file.

## Add a Namespace for the Connector

Paste the following code inside the `<mule>` tag of the header of your configuration XML:

```xml
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/microsoft-excel-online
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/microsoft-excel-online/current/mule-excel-online.xsd
```

This example shows how the namespace statements are placed in the XML block:

```xml
<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
    xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:excel="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/excel"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core
	http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
    http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/excel
    http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/excel/current/mule-excel.xsd
    http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http
    http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
    http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core
    http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">
```

## Add a POM File Dependency

The Apache Maven `pom.xml` file generated by Anypoint Studio contains dependencies for a Mule app.
When you code a Mule app manually, include this XML snippet in your `pom.xml` file to enable access
to this connector:

```xml
<dependency>
  <groupId>com.mulesoft.connectors</groupId>
  <artifactId>mule4-microsoft-excel-online-connector</artifactId>
  <version>x.x.x</version>
  <classifier>mule-plugin</classifier>
</dependency>
```

Replace `x.x.x` with the version that corresponds to the connector you are using.

To obtain the most up-to-date `pom.xml` file information:

1.  Go to [Anypoint Exchange](https://www.mulesoft.com/exchange/).
2.  In Exchange, click **Login** and supply your Anypoint Platform username and password.
3.  In Exchange, search for `excel`.
4.  Select the connector.
5.  Click **Dependency Snippets** near the upper right of the screen.

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
